Data.Label: Outcome
Values: Galactic Emperor Palpatine is killed by the redeemed Anakin Skywalker
The Order of the Sith Lords is destroyed
The Galactic Republic is restored as the New Republic
The Galactic Senate is restored as the New Republic Senate
The Jedi Order is restored as the New Jedi Order
The remnants of the Galactic Empire evacuates to Outer Rim Territories and reestablishes themselves as the Imperial Remnant
The Imperial Remnant signs the Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty
